creator: erich@tacni.net
text:
Made a mistake in the LIBDEPENDS. Here is the fixed, and correct version...
 
 # This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
 # this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
 # create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
 # have default permissions.
 #
 # This archive contains:
 #
 #       /usr/ports/net/gabber
 #       /usr/ports/net/gabber/Makefile
 #       /usr/ports/net/gabber/files
 #       /usr/ports/net/gabber/files/md5
 #       /usr/ports/net/gabber/patches
 #       /usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-ab
 #       /usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-aa
 #       /usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg
 #       /usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/COMMENT
 #       /usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/DESCR
 #       /usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/PLIST
 #
 echo c - /usr/ports/net/gabber
 mkdir -p /usr/ports/net/gabber > /dev/null 2>&1
 echo x - /usr/ports/net/gabber/Makefile
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/gabber/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/gabber/Makefile'
 X# New ports collection makefile for:    gabber
 X# Date created:         20 Jun 2000
 X# Whom:                 Erich Zigler <erich@tacni.net>
 X#
 X# $FreeBSD$
 X#
 X
 XPORTNAME=       gabber
 XPORTVERSION=    0.6.1
 XCATEGORIES=     net
 XMASTER_SITES=   http://download.sourceforge.net/gabber/
 X
 XMAINTAINER=     erich@tacni.net
 X
 XLIB_DEPENDS=   gnome.4:${PORTSDIR}/x11/gnomelibs \
 X               gtkmm-1.2:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk-- \
 X               gnomemm-1.1.2:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gnome-- \
 X               gtk12.2:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk12 \
 X               sigc.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libsigc++ \
 X               gnet.0:${PORTSDIR}/net/gnet \
 X               glade.3:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libglade \
 X               glib12.3:${PORTSDIR}/devel/glib12
 X
 XGTK_CONFIG?=    ${X11BASE}/bin/gtk12-config
 X
 XUSE_X_PREFIX=  yes
 XUSE_GMAKE=     yes
 XUSE_LIBTOOL=   yes
 XCONFIGURE_ENV+=        GTK_CONFIG="${GTK_CONFIG}" GLIB_CONFIG="${GLIB_CONFIG}" \
 X               GNOME_LIBCONFIG_PATH="${LOCALBASE}/lib:${X11BASE}/lib"
 X
 X.include <bsd.port.mk>
 END-of-/usr/ports/net/gabber/Makefile
 echo c - /usr/ports/net/gabber/files
 mkdir -p /usr/ports/net/gabber/files > /dev/null 2>&1
 echo x - /usr/ports/net/gabber/files/md5
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/gabber/files/md5 << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/gabber/files/md5'
 XMD5 (gabber-0.6.1.tar.gz) = 423c62683083c0e8d89d11448cd9e9a4
 END-of-/usr/ports/net/gabber/files/md5
 echo c - /usr/ports/net/gabber/patches
 mkdir -p /usr/ports/net/gabber/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
 echo x - /usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-ab
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-ab << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-ab'
 X--- jabberoo/Makefile.am.orig  Thu Jun 22 00:06:36 2000
 X+++ jabberoo/Makefile.am       Thu Jun 22 00:06:46 2000
 X@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 X EXTRA_DIST = include
 X-SUBDIRS = src test 
 X+SUBDIRS = src
 END-of-/usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-ab
 echo x - /usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-aa
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-aa'
 X--- jabberoo/src/sha.c.orig    Wed Jun 21 22:38:30 2000
 X+++ jabberoo/src/sha.c Wed Jun 21 22:39:14 2000
 X@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@
 X #include <sys/stat.h>
 X #ifndef WIN32
 X #include <unistd.h>
 X-#include <endian.h>
 X+#include <machine/endian.h>
 X #define INT64 long long
 X #else
 X #include <string.h>
 END-of-/usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-aa
 echo c - /usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg
 mkdir -p /usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
 echo x - /usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/COMMENT
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/COMMENT'
 XGabber: The GNOME Jabber Client
 END-of-/usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/COMMENT
 echo x - /usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/DESCR
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/DESCR'
 XGabber is a Jabber client for GNOME. No, it's not a GTK client, it's a
 XGNOME client. Originally cabbar was the GTK client, but it has not been
 Xworked on for quite some time.
 X
 XFor more information on Jabber please go to http://jabber.org
 X
 XWWW: http://gabber.sourceforge.net
 X
 X- Erich Zigler
 Xerich@tacni.net
 END-of-/usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/DESCR
 echo x - /usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/PLIST
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/PLIST'
